SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE SOTO, JAMES DBA JAMES DE SOTO BAIL BONDS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORTEZ, GUSTAVO PORTILLO $1,166.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,196.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
